title: zehneria polycarpa
intro: Zehneria polycarpa, also known as Chinese water spinach or Chinese glasswort, is a type of flowering plant in the cucumber family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing blood pressure and cholesterol levels, as well as possessing anti-cancer properties. The herbal preparations of Zehneria polycarpa include tea, infusions, and dried extracts, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
